use_cases: Circular call-to-action button with rotating text for distinctive UI appeal
Primary action buttons with animated text around a center icon element
Interactive decorative buttons for landing pages and hero sections
Brand-forward buttons with unique visual treatment for marketing campaigns
ai_summary: A circular button component featuring text characters positioned radially around a center icon. Each character is rotated based on its index creating a circular text effect that continuously animates via CSS keyframes. The center contains an arrow icon with hover transition effects, wrapped in a clean white circular element against a primary-colored background.
